RNKEXPORTS.HubSubtitle: A GM hub for exporting and restoring world data bundles.
RNKEXPORTS.SplitFilesLabel: Split files (one JSON per entry / item)
RNKEXPORTS.ExportAllDesc: Export chat, journals, selected compendia, and any selected world folders in a single ZIP bundle.
RNKEXPORTS.ExportHint: Compendium and world-folder exports can be split into one JSON file per document for easier inspection and selective restore.
RNKEXPORTS.PanelImportDesc: Import an RNK™ Exports JSON or ZIP bundle and create world documents from its contents.
RNKEXPORTS.Import.NoResults: No documents were created during import.
RNKEXPORTS.Settings.DebugHint: Show detailed export and import logs in the browser console.
RNKEXPORTS.Settings.IncludeReadableTextH: When enabled, each export also writes a readable .txt copy beside the JSON data.
RNKEXPORTS.Notifications.ExportComplete: Export complete. Your download should begin automatically.
RNKEXPORTS.Notifications.ExportFailed: Export failed. Check the console for details.
RNKEXPORTS.Notifications.NoImportFile: Please select a JSON or ZIP file to import.
RNKEXPORTS.Notifications.ImportFailed: Import failed. Check the console for details.
RNKEXPORTS.Notifications.FolderSelection: Please select at least one world folder before exporting.
RNKEXPORTS.Notifications.PackSelectionRe: Please select at least one compendium pack before exporting.
RNKEXPORTS.Empty.NoWorldFolders: No world folders were found in this world.
